title: Currently, there is no way to have folders under the archive feature to organize boards.
excerpt: There is only an Automation to Archive “Items” once complete, NOT entire “Boards” when completed. Monday.com support account representative advised we submit future feature request to the Monday.com feedback Community si…

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: There is only an Automation to Archive “Items” once complete, NOT entire “Boards” when completed. Monday.com support account representative advised we submit future feature request to the Monday.com feedback Community site page.
